_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Maintain situational awareness and functionality of organic operational infrastructure.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requirements with long-term maintainability, scalability, and operational sustainability.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-T-005 (TF, cosine: 0.461), TF-T-001 (TF, cosine: 0.454).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.362). Shared vocabulary: [operational]. DCWF-only terms [awareness, functionality, infrastructure, maintain, organic, situational] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, balance, delivery, design, immediate, implementations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.879, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Maintain situational awareness and functionality of organic operational infrastr" and "Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requ" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.512 > STS 0.362 (gap +0.150). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [operational] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.0%. Shared tokens: [operational]. DCWF-only: [awareness, functionality, infrastructure, maintain, organic, situational]. WIDAI-only: [ability, balance, delivery, design, immediate, implementations].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.150 with low STS 0.362. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
